pr.title: Update testing-axiom-cli skill with framework CLI testing checklist
pr.description:
Adds a Framework CLI verification checklist to the testing-axiom-cli skill. Covers adversarial fixture design (shuffled ordering, tie-break, negative cases), a reusable 6-test flow (create/show/export/errors/evidence), and documents the pipe character workaround for ttyd.

Devin Session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/8ad1c9ac0d2f4252bb77647f1eabaac7
pr.author: plamen-dev

commits.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
